overall.description: Cinematic game footage from a fantasy wizarding school setting, likely Hogwarts Legacy. The clip begins with a static view of a gothic castle courtyard where students in robes walk and fly on broomsticks, then transitions via crossfade to a walking perspective through a lush garden path with a fountain and scattered crows.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with circular hedge garden

events.description: wizard on broomstick flies across from left to right overhead
second broomstick flyer passes overhead from left to right
student picks up broomstick from the ground in the center of courtyard

agents.ego_description: standing stationary observing the courtyard activity and passing students

notable_agents.action: student in black robes with red trim walking from right side toward center to retrieve broomstick

entered.detail: large gothic stone castle with pointed arches and tall spires
square stone tower with crenellations attached to castle wall
circular hedge maze or garden in the center of the courtyard
paved stone courtyard ground with geometric patterns
misty mountains visible in the far background behind the castle

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic castle courtyard with students in wizard robes walking along paved paths around a circular hedge garden. Several students fly overhead on broomsticks at various intervals, and one student enters from the right to retrieve a broom from the ground near the center.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden path with tiered fountain and flower beds

events.description: crossfade transition from castle courtyard to lush garden path
flock of crows takes flight from the cobblestone path as camera approaches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward along the cobblestone path through the garden

notable_agents.action: flock of black crows scattered on the path, taking flight and scattering as the camera approaches

entered.detail: circular tiered stone fountain with water lilies floating in the basin
winding cobblestone path leading through the garden
cylindrical stone tower with crenellated top standing among trees
glass and metal greenhouse structure partially hidden by trees
white and purple flowering plants lining both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions via crossfade to a lush garden path with a tiered stone fountain on the left. The camera walks forward along cobblestones, passing a flock of crows that scatter from the path. A round stone tower becomes visible ahead on the right as the camera approaches, while the fountain passes out of view to the left rear.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from a wide, static observation of a bustling gothic courtyard into an intimate, first-person walk through a lush garden. It begins with a view of students in wizard robes navigating paved paths around a circular hedge garden while others fly overhead on broomsticks. As the perspective shifts through a seamless crossfade, the camera begins moving forward along a cobblestone path, passing a tiered stone fountain on the left. The scene then opens further as a flock of crows scatters from the path, clearing the way forward. Finally, the camera continues its advance, leaving the fountain behind as a round stone tower emerges on the right.
